description: A grid of six portrait photographs, each showing a person in U.S. Army camouflage uniform posed in front of an American flag backdrop. Name tapes on the uniforms read KHORK, AMOR, TIETJENS, COADY, MARZAN and OBRIEN, each beside a 'U.S. ARMY' tape. The subjects face the camera with neutral or slight smiling expressions.
notable_text: KHORK; AMOR; TIETJENS; COADY; MARZAN; OBRIEN; U.S. ARMY
